articles.title: Seed Will Let You Run Your Own Government, If You Grow Enough Tomatoes First
articles.summary: Seed allows players to build and manage their own society in an MMO sandbox life-sim game where everyone collaborates to share resources and develop skills. The game's early stages involve manual labor such as harvesting, building workbenches, and farming, but it becomes more challenging with injury and disease debuffs that can kill the player character. Despite these challenges, the cooperative aspects of the game are engaging and allow players to form strong bonds with their fellow society members who take on leadership roles and help each other out.
